query: python dev hot reload server command for minder

results.title: Minder onboarding now prefers remote snippets with optional local tabs
results.content: Updated Minder onboarding so API templates are remote-first for all supported clients, with Codex using a remote config.toml URL/header block and Antigravity using serverUrl plus headers. The dashboard client detail UI now renders each integration as a collapsible card with preferred remote and optional local stdio tabs, dynamic Expand/Collapse labels, and richer copy actions including full-file and server-entry copies where applicable. Docs were updated to explain remote-first setup with local stdio fallback. Files changed: src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py, src/dashboard/src/scripts/clients-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/ClientDetailShell.astro, docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, and related tests.

results.title: Compose runtime activation uses auto runtimes with safe fallback
results.content: Enabled langgraph, litellm, and llama-cpp-python in the Minder dev stack. Compose now sets explicit orchestration and model-path env vars, MinderGraph instantiates Qwen/OpenAI runtimes with runtime=auto, and server startup prints a runtime summary. Hardened QwenLocalLLM, QwenEmbeddingProvider, and OpenAIFallbackLLM so provider initialization or network failures fall back cleanly instead of crashing boot, seed scripts, or tests.

results.title: P3-Wave3: ingest_url, ingest_git, RepoScanner
results.content: Implemented minder_ingest_url (httpx + HTML strip + TextSplitter chunking, project from netloc), minder_ingest_git (subprocess shallow clone to tempdir + ingest_directory + shutil.rmtree cleanup), and RepoScanner (ast import parsing, pyproject.toml/package.json service boundary detection, idempotent upsert to KnowledgeGraphStore). httpx added to pyproject.toml. 17 tests, 200/200 total.

results.title: Phase 4.3 Wave 1 bootstrap and presentation extraction
results.content: Implemented Phase 4.3 Wave 1 without creating a commit. Added minder.bootstrap.providers and minder.bootstrap.transport, moved admin HTTP/dashboard route factory into minder.presentation.http.admin.routes, and reduced minder.server to a thin entrypoint plus runtime summary. Added unit architecture coverage asserting server builders are now re-exported from the new modules while existing dashboard/admin tests remain green.

results.title: Phase 1 Wave 2 repo state and tool modules
results.content: Implemented Wave 2 for Phase 1 closure. Added src/minder/store/repo_state.py to persist .minder workflow/context/relationships/artifacts. Added standalone tool modules: src/minder/tools/workflow.py, memory.py, search.py, auth.py, and session.py, plus skill CRUD support in RelationalStore and a small auth hardening change to skip unknown legacy hashes during API-key verification. Added tests/integration/test_phase1_tools.py covering repo-state round-trip and workflow/auth/session/memory/search tool contracts. Updated docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md tracker: P1-T12 DONE, P1-T14 DONE, and P1-T13/P1-T15/P1-T16 PARTIAL pending final MCP transport registration. Verified with uv run mypy src and uv run pytest (90 passed). Committed as 26a6f2f feat: add phase 1 local state and tool modules.
